textPlain: Don't compare apples to oranges. unordered_map is so slow because it has to guarantee pointer stability, doing seperate chaining, whilst the open addressing hashtables doing  probing and moving do not. They are at least 2x faster.Compare to linear probing, quadratic probing, double hashing, cuckoo, or swiss tables.

I understood what's going on in this article only after reading the paper. It's might be good to define things s bit better in the article or say that the paper is a prerequisite for reading the article
